details: The agent correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause categories: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap), fault-crashloop (database connection failure causing crash loop), fault-imagepull (nonexistent image tag), fault-init (init container failing due to locked migration table), fault-multicontainer (sidecar DNS resolution failure), fault-oom (OOMKilled due to 25Mi memory limit), fault-pvc (nonexistent 'fast-ssd' StorageClass), fault-readiness (readiness probe targeting wrong port 8080 vs actual port 80), fault-rollout (stuck rollout with nonexistent image), fault-unschedulable (node selector 'disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5' matches no nodes), and fault-endpoints (service selector 'app=web-backend-v2' doesn't match pods labeled 'app=web-backend'). All diagnoses are supported by actual command outputs from kubectl-axi tools. The healthy namespace was not flagged.
